new_fixes_this_run.description: Boost +8pts for ETH in TRENDING regime. 71% WR, +$9.49/trade EV on 7 live trades. Strongest cross-regime edge after BTC_TRENDING (80% WR, n=5). 20% A/B gate.
new_fixes_this_run.impact: Increases ETH confidence in best-performing regime configuration. Expected: improved ETH signal quality in trend conditions.

new_fixes_this_run.description: Trending regime min hold time increased from 2.0h to 3.0h. Created hold_time_rules_state.json (did not exist). Forensics evidence: wins exit at 3.3h median, losses at 1.5h median. Noise stops fire at 1.5h before directional moves materialize at 3.3h.
new_fixes_this_run.impact: Blocks premature exits in trending regime (noise at <1.5h vs signal at >3h). Expected: fewer stopped-out trending winners.

resolved_this_run.reason: btc_short_conf70_80_penalize_v1 has confidence_max=80.0. graduated_rules.py line 74: rule rejects when signal confidence > confidence_max. BTC SELL at 90%+ CANNOT trigger the penalize rule. Whitelist is redundant. btc_short_90plus_boost_v1 (+10pts) is the only needed rule.

reason_no_additional_fixes: CONF_70_80_GENERAL_PENALIZE: Deferred — still needs symbol+regime breakdown from 20+ live trades.
HYPE_UNKNOWN_REGIME_EXCEPTION: n=6 too small. Direction unverified.
CONF_FLOOR_70_RULE_CONFLICT: Conflict between insight_journal (+2.19/trade EV) and runtime rule (-$2321 total). Human decision needed.
BTC_TRENDING_REGIME: n=5 (80% WR, +$8.98/trade) — borderline sample, deferred until n>=10.
pending_human_review: CONF_FLOOR_70_RULE_CONFLICT — suspend conf_floor_70_v1? Insight journal shows 60-70% = +$2.19/trade EV (42% WR, 67 trades) — asymmetric R:R may be blocked.
SOL_SHORT_SUSPENSION — #1 historical alpha (+$5807, 63.7% WR). Allow 50% gate probe or maintain full block?

new_fix_this_run.description: Wire counterfactual-resolved veto outcomes back to graduated_rules.record_outcome(). Condition: 'graduated_rule_veto' in rec.skip_reason. Action: get_graduated_rules_engine().record_outcome(symbol, regime, side, won=pnl>0). Closes the veto accuracy feedback loop.
new_fix_this_run.verification: Import OK + inspect.getsource confirmed all 3 required elements present

new_finding_this_run.detail: 10 LLM graduated rules have times_applied=17 total but times_correct=0 across all. Outcome callback (the code that increments times_correct on trade close) is never firing. Rules affected: night_session_block_v1 (4 apps), rule_1777922205_0 BTC_TREND (3 apps), hype_short_veto_v1 (3 apps), btc_short_conf70_80_penalize_v1 (2 apps), conf_floor_70_v1 (2 apps), plus 5 others. RISK: conf_floor_70_v1 may be blocking 60-70% +EV signals with no validation.
new_finding_this_run.fix_needed: Find outcome callback registration in decision_engine.py or coordinator.py. Wire trade_result (win/loss) back to GraduatedRulesEngine.record_outcome(rule_id, correct=bool).

superseded_rules_flag.status: Both rules now active at different pipeline layers. Monitor for conflict on restart.
